title: Hierarchy of Basic Data Types in R
description: A visual breakdown of the fundamental data types in R, showing their hierarchy and relationship to the two main categories: Atomic Vectors and Higher-Level Objects.
relationships: Atomic Vectors are the fundamental building blocks and can be one of six types. Higher-Level Objects are built upon Atomic Vectors. Factors are built on integers. Lists can contain any data type. Data Frames are built on lists. Matrices and Arrays are built on Atomic Vectors.
